title: Cirrus: Necessary changes for v1.9 branch automation

comments.body: In order to make this PR pass CI, I'm going to just temporarily/manually tag all the `master` tagged container images to `v1.9`.  Once this PR merges, they'll all get rebuilt (I already fixed the quay.io triggers)
Okay, this is ready to go.  I had to re-run some tests a few times due to flakes and one known issue that Ed already filed.
Oh..and I've got quay rigged up to build images with a v1.9 tag as well so all bases should be covered.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.9/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
